# Home Assistant Integrations

> Agent-friendly catalog of every integration shipped with **Home Assistant**, the
> open-source home automation platform. Each integration is a building block that lets
> Home Assistant connect to a device, hub, service, or protocol. Use this to know what
> Home Assistant can already talk to when building on top of it.

**Source:** [Home Assistant integrations index](https://www.home-assistant.io/integrations.json) — generated by the Home Assistant project from each integration's manifest and documentation.

**Generated:** 2026-06-20  
**Integrations:** 1,467

Columns: **Type** is how the integration connects (see table below). **IoT class** tells you whether communication is *local* or *cloud* and *push* or *polling* — important for latency, privacy, and offline behavior. `domain` is HA's internal id and the docs slug (`https://www.home-assistant.io/integrations/<domain>/`). Regenerate with `npm run homeassistant`.

## Integration types

| Type | Meaning | Count |
|---|---|---|
| `integration` | General integration | 386 |
| `device` | Talks to a single device | 275 |
| `hub` | Connects a hub/bridge that exposes multiple devices | 266 |
| `service` | Connects an online service or API | 257 |
| `virtual` | Points to another integration that provides the support | 123 |
| `system` | Core system integration | 67 |
| `entity` | Provides entity platforms used by other integrations | 46 |
| `helper` | Built-in helper (no external device/service) | 28 |
| `brand` | A brand umbrella covering several integrations | 15 |
| `hardware` | Hardware/board support | 4 |

## Connectivity (IoT class)

| IoT class | Count |
|---|---|
| Local Polling | 442 |
| Cloud Polling | 419 |
| Local Push | 314 |
| Cloud Push | 130 |
| Unspecified | 112 |
| Calculated | 32 |
| Assumed State | 18 |
